Rule.name: Rule-Template
Rule.Description:
Template rule skeleton. Replace the name, type, description, and source with your implementation. See the SailPoint IdentityIQ documentation for available rule types and the variables available in each rule's scope.
Common rule types: - IdentityTrigger: Fires on identity change events - IdentityCreation: Fires when a new identity is created - Correlation: Matches accounts to identities during aggregation - BuildMap: Transforms aggregated account data - FieldValue: Computes field values during provisioning - BeforeProvisioning / AfterProvisioning: Pre/post provisioning hooks - CertificationExclusion: Excludes items from certification campaigns
